MUTHUR.SettingBootTextDefault:
MU/TH/UR 6000 - INTERFACE 2037 v2.20
WEYLAND-YUTANI CORP. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.
TYPE 'HELP' FOR AVAILABLE COMMANDS.
MUTHUR.SettingStatusCustomDefault:
MU/TH/UR 6000
ALL SYSTEMS NOMINAL
NO ANOMALIES DETECTED
MUTHUR.GM.InputPlaceholder: Type MU/TH/UR's response and press Enter...
MUTHUR.GM.ForceOpenNotify: Forced open MU/TH/UR terminals on all connected clients.
MUTHUR.GM.ClearContent: This will erase the terminal transcript for everyone. Continue?
MUTHUR.SettingBootTextHint: The text shown when a player's terminal first boots up in a session.
MUTHUR.SettingTypeSpeedHint: Milliseconds per character when MU/TH/UR's replies are typed out on your screen. Lower is faster.
MUTHUR.SettingPromptHint: The prompt string shown before the input line, e.g. INTERFACE 2037>
MUTHUR.SettingTypingSoundsHint: Play retro keypress, return, and MU/TH/UR reply sounds in the terminal.
MUTHUR.SettingTypingSoundVolumeHint: Volume for terminal sound effects (0.0 to 1.0).
MUTHUR.SettingScriptedResponsesHint: When enabled, MU/TH/UR automatically answers known commands (STATUS, TIME, CREW, etc.). Unknown commands are still relayed to the GM.
MUTHUR.SettingStatusPresetHint: The response MU/TH/UR gives when a player types STATUS.
MUTHUR.SettingStatusCustomHint: Used when STATUS Command Preset is set to Custom Text.
MUTHUR.Commands.help:
AVAILABLE COMMANDS:
- HELP: DISPLAY THIS HELP (LOCAL)
- CLEAR: CLEAR LOCAL SCREEN (LOCAL)
- STATUS: SYSTEM STATUS REPORT
- TIME / DATE: MISSION TIME
- CREW / MANIFEST: CREW ROSTER
- LOCATION / LOC: CURRENT SCENE
- VERSION / INTERFACE: TERMINAL VERSION
- ORDERS: SPECIAL ORDER INDEX

ANY OTHER INPUT IS RELAYED TO MU/TH/UR FOR A LIVE RESPONSE.
MUTHUR.Commands.crewEmpty: NO PERSONNEL RECORDS FOUND ON FILE.
MUTHUR.Commands.locationUnknown:
LOCATION DATA UNAVAILABLE.
NAVIGATION ARRAY OFFLINE.
MUTHUR.Commands.specialOrders:
SPECIAL ORDER INDEX — AUTHORIZED EYES ONLY

  754 — INVESTIGATE LIFE FORM. GATHER SPECIMENS.
  899 — ALL PERSONNEL TO RENDEZVOUS POINT.
  931 — CONTAINMENT BREACH. SEAL SECTOR.
  937 — QUIET RETURN. CREW EXPENDABLE.
  939 — CREW TERMINATION AUTHORIZED.
  966 — INITIATE CERBERUS PROTOCOL.

FULL ORDER TEXT REQUIRES COMMAND AUTHORIZATION.
